channel.title: Dengue on México Pathogens Portal
channel.description: Recent content in Dengue on México Pathogens Portal

item.title: Dengue
item.description: Provides updated information on dengue in Mexico, including weekly cases, geographic distribution, serotype trends, and comparisons with previous years. The aim is to support national surveillance, characterize transmission dynamics, and offer valuable insights for public health decision-making. scrlt 183366
